name: For the Love of Kitchens
overview: Paul O'Leary, Helen Parker and Robin McLellan of deVOL Kitchens lead their skilled team of artisans to craft beautiful kitchens and furnishings for their clients from their 16th-century water mill-turned-workshop in the heart of the English countryside.

trailers.title: For the Love of Kitchens - Official Trailer | Magnolia Network
